title: justicia ovata var. lanceolata
intro: Justicia ovata var. lanceolata, also known as the lance-leaved water-willow, is a tropical plant species native to Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia ovata var. lanceolata include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and soothing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall well-being.
